channel.title: OpenSpeaks Community language documentation and archiving training on CLDA Training
channel.description: Recent content in OpenSpeaks Community language documentation and archiving training on CLDA Training

item.title: Contributing to the Data Literacy Training Course
item.description: This guide walks through setting up the project from scratch on a new machine. Editing content via “Edit this page” Every page on this site shows an Edit this page link at the bottom. This is the quickest way to fix a typo, update outdated content, or add a paragraph — no local setup required. How it works Open the page you want to edit and click Edit this page at the bottom.

item.title: Credits
item.description: Contributors Module co-authors: Ganesh Birua is a Ho language activist from Mayurbhanj, Odisha. Since 2017, he has created hundreds of educational images, run the Warang Chiti Project 2030, and collaborated with OpenSpeaks Archives on transcriptions and translations. गणेश विरुआ मयूरभंज, ओडिशा के एक हो भाषा कार्यकर्ता हैं। 2017 से उन्होंने सैकड़ों शैक्षिक चित्र बनाए हैं, और वारंग चिटी प्रोजेक्ट 2030 चलाते हैं, और ट्रांसक्रिप्शन और अनुवाद के लिए OpenSpeaks Archives के साथ सहयोग किया है। Ramjit Tudu is a Santali language activist and technologist from Mayurbhanj, Odisha.
